chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-40 of 2019 Date Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case. For hearing of CMA No. 5056/2025 (151 CPC) 17.09.2025 Mr. Alam Sher Bozdar, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Abdul Mujeeb Shaikh, Advocate for respondents. Mr. Ishfaque Ahmed Abro, Deputy Attorney General. Mr. Sharyar Ali Awan, Assistant Advocate General..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Abdul Mujeeb Shaikh, Advocate for respondents submits that neither meter is installed in the name of petitioner nor arrears are outstanding against her and the arrears in respect of previous meter are outstanding against Ghulam Qadir. He further submits that same arrears will not be recovered from the present petitioner however same will be recovered from Ghulam Qadir. After such statement counsel for the petitioner seeks disposal of the instant petition, hence same is hereby disposed of. The petitioner is directed to pay regular monthly electricity bill as per meter which is in her name. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
